title: Toolbox Promo
excerpt: I am so excited to be contributing to Studio Calico's upcoming TOOLBOX class. This class will fill your crafting toolbox with cool tips on stitching, mixed media, misting and digital from four technique masters. Amy Tan, Celine Navarro, Geralyn Sy…
body:
I am so excited to be contributing to Studio Calico's upcoming TOOLBOX class. This class will fill your crafting toolbox with cool tips on stitching, mixed media, misting and digital from four technique masters. Amy Tan, Celine Navarro, Geralyn Sy and Shanna Noel will each spend a week in August teaching you the ins and outs of their favorite techniques.

TEACHERS

Amy Tan | Stitching

Celine Navarro | Mixed Media

Geralyn Sy | Mist

Shanna Noel | Digital

STITCHING CONTRIBUTORS : Patricia Roebuck | Sasha Farina | Jen Jockisch | Becky Novacek

MIXED MEDIA CONTRIBUTORS : Stephanie Bryan | Lisa Spangler | Marcy Penner | Anna-Maria Wolniak

MISTING CONTRIBUTORS : Dana Fleckenstein | Jill Sprott | Nicole Reaves | Dani Flanders

DIGITAL CONTRIBUTORS : Catherine Davis | Barbara Picinich | Stephanie Washburn | Tina Aszmus

Registration is only open through July 31st and class begins on August 5th. For more information, visit Studio Calico.

SPECIAL PROMO: Through 7.24, Studio Calico has a cool offer for everyone who signs up for Toolbox - they'll be able to pass a FREE spot in the class to a friend. This includes the students who are already signed up - the codes will be emailed out on 7.25. Here are all the details:

Pop over to the Studio Calico blog for more links to class sneaks and giveaways, but first...

Leave a comment telling me something good. Will announce the winner of the spot in the class on Monday, July 22. Good luck!

Giveaway is now closed - winner is #45:

Louise says: 
July 19, 2013 at 12:32 pm
something good……sunshine and this new class….perfect x

CONGRATS!
